headline: Palo Alto Networks Founder Agrees to Buy California Bank for AI Revamp
summary: Palo Alto Networks  founder  Nir Zuk  agreed to buy local California lender Liberty Bank, according to people familiar with the matter.  Zuk plans to use Liberty as a launchpad for artificial-intelligence tools aimed at financial services.  The billionaire Zuk has sought approval from U.S. regulators to acquire the largest stake in Liberty from private-equity firms Stone Point Capital and Reverence Capital Partners, the people said.
